scripts.build:extension: mkdir -p apps/extensions/developertools/dist && esbuild apps/extensions/developertools/popup.js --bundle --loader:.js=ts --outfile=apps/extensions/developertools/dist/popup.js && cp apps/extensions/developertools/popup.html apps/extensions/developertools/dist/ && cp apps/extensions/developertools/manifest.json apps/extensions/developertools/dist/ && cp -r apps/extensions/developertools/icons apps/extensions/developertools/dist/ && cd apps/extensions/developertools/dist && zip -r ../developertools-extension.zip . -x "*.zip"
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e
